cards.title: Mountain Bike
cards.author: TrailBlazer
cards.description: A rugged mountain bike model ready for off-road adventures.
cards.extended_desc:
A rugged mountain bike model ready for off-road adventures.

**Highlights:**
- Detailed frame, fork, and wheel assembly
- Suitable for rendering, animation, or fabrication prep
- Includes STEP and mesh exports for broad compatibility

cards.title: Modern Chair
cards.author: FurniStudio
cards.description: Minimalist chair design with clean curves and ergonomic proportions.
cards.extended_desc:
Minimalist chair design with clean curves and ergonomic proportions.

This model focuses on *ergonomic seating geometry* and a refined silhouette that fits modern interiors. The surfaces are clean, making it a great base for upholstery experiments or CNC plans.

cards.title: Robot Arm
cards.author: MechLab
cards.description: Industrial 6-axis robot arm assembly for automation projects.
cards.extended_desc:
Industrial 6-axis robot arm assembly for automation projects.

The assembly includes base, shoulder, elbow, and wrist joints with realistic motion envelopes. It is intended for **simulation, educational demos, and conceptual factory layouts** rather than production deployment.

cards.title: Desk Lamp
cards.author: Lumina
cards.description: Adjustable articulated desk lamp with a classic workshop look.
cards.extended_desc:
Adjustable articulated desk lamp with a classic workshop look.

The lamp features a hinged arm and swivel head so you can pose it naturally in renders. Use it to add *warm, functional detail* to workshop or studio scenes.

cards.title: Drone Frame
cards.author: AeroDesign
cards.description: Lightweight quadcopter frame optimized for long flight times.
cards.extended_desc:
Lightweight quadcopter frame optimized for long flight times.

The frame is designed around a *central battery bay* and minimalist arms to reduce weight. It works well for aerodynamic studies, hobby builds, or as a starting point for custom electronics integration.

cards.title: CNC Router Table
cards.author: MakerWorks
cards.description: Compact desktop CNC router table for wood and aluminum.
cards.extended_desc:
Compact desktop CNC router table for wood and aluminum.

The frame is rigid enough for light aluminum passes yet compact for benchtop use. Consider pairing it with a custom spoilboard and dust shoe for a complete hobby setup.

cards.title: Parametric Shelf
cards.author: ShelfGen
cards.description: Adjustable wall shelf driven by width and height parameters.
cards.extended_desc:
Adjustable wall shelf driven by width and height parameters.

This parametric shelf lets you change *width, depth, and bracket spacing* to match your space. It is a practical introduction to constraint-driven modeling for furniture projects.

cards.title: Racing Wheel
cards.author: SimGear
cards.description: Sim racing steering wheel with button box cutouts.
cards.extended_desc:
Sim racing steering wheel with button box cutouts.

The wheel rim and button plate are modeled for *DIY sim rigs*. Cutouts are sized for common arcade buttons and rotary encoders, so you can move from CAD to controller fairly quickly.

cards.title: Brutalist Vase
cards.author: FormLab
cards.description: Angular concrete-cast vase inspired by brutalist architecture.
cards.extended_desc:
Angular concrete-cast vase inspired by brutalist architecture.

Bold planes and raw texture give this vase a *monumental presence* despite its small scale. It prints or casts cleanly and works as a standalone decor piece or a study in form and shadow.

cards.title: Arduino Enclosure
cards.author: CircuitCase
cards.description: Snap-fit enclosure for standard Arduino Uno boards.
cards.extended_desc:
Snap-fit enclosure for standard Arduino Uno boards.

The lid snaps on without screws and leaves the USB and power headers accessible. It is a reliable starting point for **portable sensor boxes, teaching kits, and quick prototypes**.

cards.title: Gothic Cathedral Window
cards.author: StoneMason
cards.description: Ornate Gothic window tracery for architectural visualization.
cards.extended_desc:
Ornate Gothic window tracery for architectural visualization.

The tracery captures the pointed arches and stone mullions typical of Gothic design. Use it to add *authentic detail* to historic buildings, fantasy environments, or cathedral interiors.

cards.title: Gearbox Assembly
cards.author: GearHead
cards.description: Two-stage reduction gearbox with involute spur gears.
cards.extended_desc:
Two-stage reduction gearbox with involute spur gears.

Each gear is modeled with involute tooth profiles suitable for motion studies. The assembly is a useful reference for learning about **gear ratios, bearing placement, and shaft alignment**.

cards.title: Low-Poly Tree Pack
cards.author: PolyNature
cards.description: Twelve stylized trees for game environments.
cards.extended_desc:
Twelve stylized trees for game environments.

The pack includes a variety of *canopy shapes and trunk styles* to populate scenes quickly. Models are low-poly and unwrap-friendly, making them ideal for mobile or stylized desktop games.

cards.title: Foldable Phone Stand
cards.author: PocketProp
cards.description: Flat-pack phone stand that folds without fasteners.
cards.extended_desc:
Flat-pack phone stand that folds without fasteners.

The stand ships as a single flat piece and locks into shape by flexing tabs. It is a satisfying **first laser-cutter or 3D-print project** for beginners.

cards.title: Mars Rover Replica
cards.author: RedPlanet
cards.description: Detailed scale model of a six-wheeled rover chassis.
cards.extended_desc:
Detailed scale model of a six-wheeled rover chassis.

The chassis features a rocker-bogie suspension layout inspired by planetary rovers. It is perfect for *robotics competitions, educational demonstrations, or sci-fi display builds*.

cards.title: Kitchen Hook Rail
cards.author: OrganizeIt
cards.description: Wall-mounted rail with adjustable utensil hooks.
cards.extended_desc:
Wall-mounted rail with adjustable utensil hooks.

The rail system keeps kitchen tools within reach while freeing drawer space. Hooks slide along the rail, so you can *reconfigure the layout* as your collection changes.

cards.title: Retro Arcade Cabinet
cards.author: PixelCade
cards.description: Quarter-scale arcade cabinet with joystick cutouts.
cards.extended_desc:
Quarter-scale arcade cabinet with joystick cutouts.

This nostalgic cabinet captures the look of classic upright arcade machines in a compact form. Add a tiny screen and joystick to turn it into a **fun desk accessory or game scene prop**.

cards.title: Wind Turbine Blade
cards.author: GreenEnergy
cards.description: Parametric wind turbine blade profile for small generators.
cards.extended_desc:
Parametric wind turbine blade profile for small generators.

The blade profile can be adjusted for *diameter, pitch, and chord length* to match your generator. It is intended for small-scale renewable energy experiments and classroom demonstrations.

cards.title: Modular Drawer Organizer
cards.author: TidyBox
cards.description: Interlocking trays that adapt to drawer widths.
cards.extended_desc:
Interlocking trays that adapt to drawer widths.

The trays connect with simple dovetail joints that slide together without glue. Mix and match lengths to build a **custom organizer for any drawer or workbench shelf**.

cards.title: Human Skull Study
cards.author: Anatomy3D
cards.description: Anatomically referenced skull model for study and art.
cards.extended_desc:
Anatomically referenced skull model for study and art.

The skull is proportioned for *anatomy study, figure drawing reference, and medical visualization*. It balances accuracy with clean topology, so it also sculpts and renders well.

cards.title: Solar Panel Mount
cards.author: OffGrid
cards.description: Adjustable roof mount for 100W solar panels.
cards.extended_desc:
Adjustable roof mount for 100W solar panels.

The mount allows tilt adjustment for seasonal sun angles and uses common hardware. Review local wind and snow loads before fabricating, since this model is **educational, not engineered for installation**.

cards.title: Mechanical Keyboard Case
cards.author: KeyCrafter
cards.description: Minimalist 65% keyboard case with gasket mounting.
cards.extended_desc:
Minimalist 65% keyboard case with gasket mounting.

The case uses a gasket strip mount to soften the typing feel and simplify assembly. It is a popular starting point for *custom mechanical keyboard builds* using standard 65% PCBs.

cards.title: Victorian Street Lamp
cards.author: Gaslight
cards.description: Ornate cast-iron street lamp for historic scenes.
cards.extended_desc:
Ornate cast-iron street lamp for historic scenes.

The lamp features decorative brackets and a fluted post typical of 19th-century design. It adds *instant atmosphere* to period street scenes, parks, and architectural visualizations.

cards.title: Pneumatic Cylinder
cards.author: AirPower
cards.description: Double-acting pneumatic cylinder with mounting brackets.
cards.extended_desc:
Double-acting pneumatic cylinder with mounting brackets.

The cylinder assembly includes clevis mounts and port fittings for motion simulations. Use it to teach **pneumatic actuation concepts** or to detail industrial machine models.

cards.title: Tiny House Frame
cards.author: CompactLiving
cards.description: Structural frame for a 24-foot tiny house on wheels.
cards.extended_desc:
Structural frame for a 24-foot tiny house on wheels.

The frame is laid out with trailer mounting points and floor joist pockets. It is meant as a *conceptual planning model* and should be reviewed by a qualified designer before actual construction.

cards.title: Rocket Engine Nozzle
cards.author: LaunchPad
cards.description: Bell-shaped nozzle for educational propulsion demos.
cards.extended_desc:
Bell-shaped nozzle for educational propulsion demos.

The bell contour follows a simplified Rao profile for subsonic and supersonic flow discussions. This is a **visual teaching aid**, not a flight-rated component.

cards.title: Cable Chain
cards.author: WireManager
cards.description: Printable energy chain for cable management on moving gantries.
cards.extended_desc:
Printable energy chain for cable management on moving gantries.

The links snap together to form a flexible cable carrier for 3D printers, CNC machines, or camera sliders. Print a short run to test *bend radius and retention* before scaling up.

cards.title: Meditation Fountain
cards.author: ZenFlow
cards.description: Small indoor water fountain with quiet pump housing.
cards.extended_desc:
Small indoor water fountain with quiet pump housing.

The design isolates the pump in a hidden chamber to reduce noise and splashing. It brings a *calming presence* to desks, meditation corners, or small interior scenes.

cards.title: Exoskeleton Hand
cards.author: BioMech
cards.description: Wearable hand exoskeleton for rehabilitation research.
cards.extended_desc:
Wearable hand exoskeleton for rehabilitation research.

The exoskeleton is sized for adult hands and leaves the palm open for natural grasping. It is strictly a **research and visualization concept**, not a certified medical device.

cards.title: Board Game Insert
cards.author: TableTopOrg
cards.description: Organizer trays for a popular strategy board game.
cards.extended_desc:
Organizer trays for a popular strategy board game.

The trays keep cards, tokens, and player pieces sorted between sessions. They are sized for *standard storage boxes* and can be adapted to other games with similar components.

cards.title: Concrete Planter
cards.author: UrbanGarden
cards.description: Geometric planter mold for cast concrete.
cards.extended_desc:
Geometric planter mold for cast concrete.

The mold splits cleanly to release the cast without undercuts. Use it to make *modern concrete planters* for succulents, herbs, or interior styling.

cards.title: Servo Motor Bracket
cards.author: BotBits
cards.description: Universal bracket for standard hobby servo motors.
cards.extended_desc:
Universal bracket for standard hobby servo motors.

The bracket fits common 9g and standard servo footprints and includes mounting ears. It is ideal for *robotics arms, walking mechanisms, and automated displays*.

cards.title: Art Deco Clock
cards.author: TickTock
cards.description: Desktop clock with Art Deco dial and case details.
cards.extended_desc:
Desktop clock with Art Deco dial and case details.

The case combines geometric step forms with an elegant dial layout. It makes a *striking desk piece* and a good introduction to decorative product modeling.

cards.title: PCB Holder
cards.author: SolderStation
cards.description: Adjustable printed circuit board holder for soldering.
cards.extended_desc:
Adjustable printed circuit board holder for soldering.

The holder clamps PCBs at a comfortable angle and leaves both hands free for soldering. It is a **must-have bench tool** for electronics repair and prototyping.

cards.title: Hexagonal Tile
cards.author: Tessellate
cards.description: Interlocking hex floor tile with grip texture.
cards.extended_desc:
Interlocking hex floor tile with grip texture.

The hexagonal pattern tiles seamlessly and adds subtle surface grip. Use it for *architectural floors, outdoor patios, or game environment ground planes*.

cards.title: Hydraulic Press Die
cards.author: ForgeTools
cards.description: Die set for pressing simple sheet metal forms.
cards.extended_desc:
Die set for pressing simple sheet metal forms.

The punch and die are aligned with guide posts for repeatable forming. This is a **conceptual tooling set** and should be validated by a machinist before use.

cards.title: Space Station Module
cards.author: OrbitOutpost
cards.description: Modular sci-fi habitat module with docking ports.
cards.extended_desc:
Modular sci-fi habitat module with docking ports.

The module can be tiled end-to-end to build stations, outposts, or spacecraft. Docking ports and surface paneling give it a *cohesive futuristic look* for games and renders.

cards.title: Electric Guitar Body
cards.author: LuthierCAD
cards.description: Classic solid-body guitar shape with neck pocket.
cards.extended_desc:
Classic solid-body guitar shape with neck pocket.

The body includes a neck pocket, pickup cavities, and control routs to kickstart an instrument build. It is a *starting template* for luthiers and guitar enthusiasts.

cards.title: Warehouse Pallet Rack
cards.author: Logistics3D
cards.description: Industrial pallet racking unit for warehouse layouts.
cards.extended_desc:
Industrial pallet racking unit for warehouse layouts.

The racking unit follows common warehouse dimensions and can be duplicated into full aisles. It is useful for *layout planning, logistics visualizations, and game environments*.

cards.title: Steam Engine Cylinder
cards.author: VintageWorks
cards.description: Oscillating steam engine cylinder for model builders.
cards.extended_desc:
Oscillating steam engine cylinder for model builders.

The cylinder and port block are modeled for classic oscillating steam engine layouts. It is a **great weekend machining project** for model-engine enthusiasts.

cards.title: Dungeons Props Pack
cards.author: QuestAssets
cards.description: Crates, barrels, and torches for tabletop RPG scenes.
cards.extended_desc:
Crates, barrels, and torches for tabletop RPG scenes.

The prop pack covers essential dungeon-crawling clutter in a unified style. Scatter them across a grid to *quickly build atmosphere* for virtual or printed tabletop sessions.

cards.title: Bicycle Chain Guard
cards.author: CycleSafe
cards.description: Protective chain guard for city bicycles.
cards.extended_desc:
Protective chain guard for city bicycles.

The guard covers the chainring and top run of chain to keep clothing clean. It mounts with standard braze-ons and is a *practical upgrade for commuter bikes*.

cards.title: Smart Mirror Frame
cards.author: ReflectTech
cards.description: Frame housing for a wall-mounted smart mirror build.
cards.extended_desc:
Frame housing for a wall-mounted smart mirror build.

The housing wraps a display, controller, and two-way mirror into one clean unit. Cable routing channels keep wiring tidy, and the parametric depth lets it fit *various screen sizes*.

cards.title: Japanese Garden Lantern
cards.author: ZenGarden
cards.description: Traditional stone lantern for garden visualization.
cards.extended_desc:
Traditional stone lantern for garden visualization.

The lantern captures the stacked stone blocks and fire box of a *tōrō*. It brings a peaceful, traditional accent to Japanese garden renders and miniature scenes.

cards.title: Quadcopter Propeller
cards.author: PropForge
cards.description: Parametric drone propeller with pitch adjustment.
cards.extended_desc:
Parametric drone propeller with pitch adjustment.

The propeller can be tuned for *diameter, pitch, and hub bore* to match different motors. It is useful for airflow visualization, drone design studies, or game vehicle props.

cards.title: Workbench Pegboard
cards.author: ShopOrganizer
cards.description: Modular pegboard holders for common hand tools.
cards.extended_desc:
Modular pegboard holders for common hand tools.

The holders lock into standard perforated board and can be mixed to match your tool collection. Print a set to *reclaim bench space* and keep frequently used tools visible.

cards.title: Heart Valve Model
cards.author: BioModel
cards.description: Simplified anatomical heart valve for educational demos.
cards.extended_desc:
Simplified anatomical heart valve for educational demos.

The model shows the general leaflets and annulus shape of an atrioventricular valve. It is intended for **biology lessons, patient communication, and anatomy visualization**, not surgical planning.

cards.title: Autonomous Rover Kit
cards.author: RoverLab
cards.description: Beginner-friendly rover chassis with sensor mounts.
cards.extended_desc:
Beginner-friendly rover chassis with sensor mounts.

The chassis has flat mounting pads for ultrasonic sensors, line followers, and microcontrollers. It is designed as a *stepping stone into robotics programming* and simple navigation experiments.

cards.title: Crystal Chandelier
cards.author: LuxLight
cards.description: Ornate crystal chandelier for interior renders.
cards.extended_desc:
Ornate crystal chandelier for interior renders.

The chandelier features branching arms, candle-style lights, and hanging crystal accents. It adds *elegant sparkle* to ballroom, dining, or luxury interior scenes.

cards.title: Motorcycle Helmet
cards.author: RiderGear
cards.description: Aerodynamic full-face helmet concept model.
cards.extended_desc:
Aerodynamic full-face helmet concept model.

The helmet blends sportbike aerodynamics with a smooth, sculptural form. Use it for *vehicle concept art, safety design studies, or racing-themed renders*.

cards.title: Floating Shelf Bracket
cards.author: HiddenMount
cards.description: Concealed bracket for wall-mounted floating shelves.
cards.extended_desc:
Concealed bracket for wall-mounted floating shelves.

The bracket hides inside the shelf while supporting weight through a rigid wall plate. It creates the *clean, floating look* popular in modern shelving without visible hardware.

cards.title: Sci-Fi Cargo Crate
cards.author: StarFreight
cards.description: Weathered sci-fi shipping crate with lid detail.
cards.extended_desc:
Weathered sci-fi shipping crate with lid detail.

The crate includes panel seams, reinforcing ribs, and a hinged lid for scene interaction. Its utilitarian look fits *cargo bays, freighters, and post-apocalyptic storage scenes*.

cards.title: Parametric Bookend
cards.author: ShelfStyle
cards.description: Adjustable bookend profile with customizable text.
cards.extended_desc:
Adjustable bookend profile with customizable text.

The bookend uses a parametric profile that can be stretched or embossed with a custom label. It is a small but satisfying project for *personalizing a desk or shelf*.

cards.title: Hovercraft Skirt
cards.author: AirCushion
cards.description: Segmented skirt geometry for small hovercraft models.
cards.extended_desc:
Segmented skirt geometry for small hovercraft models.

The segmented skirt traps lift air while allowing the craft to ride over small obstacles. It is a *fun entry point* into ground-effect vehicle design and aerodynamics experiments.
